zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Gambon於1383年出生在英國戴文哈爾波頓時，她的父親Sir William Gambon Of Moreston28歲，母親Isabelle Tucker23歲。她於1410年與William Gilbert Jr在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1444年在英國英格蘭戴文馬爾頓享年61歲，埋葬在英國戴文馬爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Gambon于1383年出生在英国戴文哈爾波頓时，她的父亲Sir William Gambon Of Moreston28岁，母亲Isabelle Tucker23岁。她于1410年与William Gilbert Jr在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1444年在英国英格兰戴文馬爾頓享年61岁，埋葬在英国戴文馬爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Gambon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gammon
meanings: nickname from a diminutive (‘little leg’) of gamb, the Norman form of jambe ‘leg’; mb would be assimilated to mm, hence Gammon. Compare French Gambet, Gambin, Gambon.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Gambon was born in 1383, in Halberton, Devon, England, her father, Sir William Gambon Of Moreston, was 28 and her mother, Isabelle Tucker, was 23. She married William Gilbert Jr in 1410, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1444, in Marldon, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Marldon, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Gambon est née en 1383, à Halberton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Gambon Of Moreston, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Isabelle Tucker, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé William Gilbert Jr en 1410, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1444, à Marldon, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Marldon, Devon, Angleterre.

de.Compton Castle, Maldron, Devonshire, Eng: Compton Castle, Devon, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Gambon 1383 in Halberton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Gambon Of Moreston 28 und ihre Mutter Isabelle Tucker 23. Sie hat 1410 in Devon, England, United Kingdom William Gilbert Jr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1444 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Marldon, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Marldon, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Gambon è nata il nel 1383 nel Halberton, Devon, England, sua padre, Sir William Gambon Of Moreston, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Isabelle Tucker, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato William Gilbert Jr nel 1410, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1444, nel Marldon, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Marldon, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Gambonが1383年にイギリスデボンハルバートンで生まれた時，父Sir William Gambon Of Morestonは28歳，母Isabelle Tuckerは23歳であった。1410年にイギリスイギリスデボンでWilliam Gilbert Jrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1444年にイギリスイギリスデボンマルルドンで61歳で死去し，イギリスデボンマルルドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Gambon(이)가 1383년 영국 데폰 할버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Gambon Of Moreston(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle Tucker(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 William Gilbert Jr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1444년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 말를던에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 말를던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Gambon nasceu em 1383, em Halberton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Gambon Of Moreston, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle Tucker, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com William Gilbert Jr em 1410, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1444, em Marldon, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Marldon, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Gambon родилась в 1383 г. в местности хэлбиртон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Gambon Of Moreston было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle Tucker, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Gilbert Jr в 1410 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1444 г. в местности марлдон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности марлдон, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Gambon nació en 1383, en Halberton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Gambon Of Moreston, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Isabelle Tucker, tenía 23 años. Se casó con William Gilbert Jr en 1410, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1444, en Marldon, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Marldon, Devon, Inglaterra.
